positive: Minimalist geometric cityscape at dawn, viewed from above. The scene features stylized, intersecting lines forming buildings, mountains, and abstract natural elements like sweeping rivers and sunbeams. Use a color palette of muted teal, warm ochre, deep indigo, and burnt orange. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and bold, contrasting shapes suitable for screen printing. Composition must be symmetrical and centrally composed, utilizing negative space effectively. Style: Modern vector art meets Art Deco poster design, with sharp edges and graphic flatness. Lighting: High contrast, emphasizing clean edge definition. Print-friendly, single continuous artwork.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, watermark, logo, text, signature, messy, photorealism, gradient sky, depth of field, soft focus, low detail, clutter
